title_en: Mission Samudra
verbatim: "Mission Samudra" will be implemented to enhance Kerala's potential with a strong presence on the world maritime map within five years by combining Kerala's 600 km coastline, 44 rivers, 34 lakes, four international airports, and the comprehensive potential of the Malanad and Edanad regions. As part of this, a water transport system will be developed in phases by connecting large and small ports. In the first phase, efficient freight transport will be provided, followed by convenient travel services for the people, and in the last phase, a unified network will be established by connecting water bodies.

title_en: Aviation development
verbatim: For the comprehensive aviation development of Kerala, short-term and long-term projects including modern pilot training with full-flight simulators and aviation staff training will be formulated in the state, including the Aviation Institute, the construction of the second phase of the runway at the Kochi airport, airport economic zones, free trade godown zones, runway, terminal and apron development at the Kannur airport, MRO (Maintenance, Repair, and Operations) centers for the maintenance, repair and comprehensive inspection of aircraft, logistics parks, and a Route Development and Connectivity Fund to support new flight services.

title_en: MSME enterprises
verbatim: A comprehensive scheme will be formulated to provide essential assistance to start up about a thousand MSME enterprises with an annual revenue potential of more than 100 crores across the state. Revolving fund, technology fund and challenge fund will be made available to provide necessary capital support to the entrepreneurs. The assistance of techno-mentors and management-mentors will be ensured to provide expert guidance in technical and management-related areas.

title_en: Job Watch Tower
verbatim: The nature of work is changing in the international job market. A 'Job Watch Tower' comprising experts will be formed to study the changing nature of work and make changes in the higher education sector based on that.”

title_en: Wayanad Tribal University
verbatim: A university with modern facilities will be established with the aim of educational, cultural and social progress of the tribal community in the tribal Wayanad district.

title_en: Steps will be taken to make social security pension a right instead of a privilege. A law will be implemented to ensu...
verbatim: Steps will be taken to make social security pension a right instead of a privilege. A law will be implemented to ensure pension to those who are eligible. Welfare pension will be increased to Rs. 3000. A Welfare Pension Commission will be formed on the model of the Pay Commission.

title_en: The 'Aashraya' scheme, which was implemented during the UDF era and received much acclaim by identifying the most imp...
verbatim: The 'Aashraya' scheme, which was implemented during the UDF era and received much acclaim by identifying the most impoverished people, will be revised in a timely manner and its second phase, Nava Ashraya, will be launched.

title_en: A special action plan will be formulated to alleviate and eradicate poverty among yellow (Anthyodaya) and pink ration...
verbatim: A special action plan will be formulated to alleviate and eradicate poverty among yellow (Anthyodaya) and pink ration card holders.

verbatim: To ensure a hunger-free Kerala, the Indira Canteen, which provides food at low prices, will be started, as implemented by the Corporation Governing Council in Ernakulam.

verbatim: Steps will be taken to increase the wages and working days of the employment guarantee scheme, which the central government is trying to destroy.

verbatim: 'Yuva Shakti Nadin Sampath': 5 percent of the project allocation will be set aside for various activities for the youth. Steps will be taken to start Kudumbashree model 'Yuvashree' groups for the youth.

verbatim: Steps will be taken to appoint government-approved panchayat volunteers to provide services to the elderly. Assistance will be provided to institutions that start providing services to the elderly.

title_en: The provision in the 2016 Bill of Rights that requires people with disabilities to be paid 25% more than their Social...

A special fund will be formed for this purpose.

verbatim: Steps will be taken to establish "Sneha Sumangali" wedding halls with modern facilities to conduct weddings at low cost for the poor in Kerala.

verbatim: A Media Welfare Board will be established to provide healthcare to media workers.

verbatim: Steps will be taken to provide quality insulin to children with type 1 diabetes, insulin pumps to children with bright diabetes, and continuous glucose monitoring sensors to children facing more challenges.

title_en: To bring about timely changes in the activities of the Technical Committee of the Mithai Project and to prevent misap...
verbatim: To bring about timely changes in the activities of the Technical Committee of the Mithai Project and to prevent misappropriation of the funds allocated for the project, arrangements will be made to provide the services of endocrine doctors at Mithai Satellite Centers in all districts.

title_en: We will study the problems of online taxi systems and take remedial action. We will take action to make online taxi c...

title_en: Insurance coverage will be ensured for Green Karma Sena members.
verbatim: Insurance coverage will be ensured for Green Karma Sena members.

verbatim: Steps will be taken to make the material collection facilities associated with the Green Karma Sena more scientific and to provide vehicle facilities for waste removal.

verbatim: Necessary interventions will be made to simplify the attendance process to address the difficulties faced by job-guaranteed workers due to the method of taking photos to record their attendance.

verbatim: The government, which is facing a crisis, will take steps to resolve the problems of contractors.

verbatim: The Ayyankali Employment Guarantee Scheme will ensure 100 days of employment. Necessary amendments will be made to the guidelines.

title_en: Palliative care will focus more on providing relief from symptoms, pain, and stress for those with serious illnesses.
verbatim: Palliative care will focus more on providing relief from symptoms, pain, and stress for those with serious illnesses.

title_en: Steps will be taken to approve the appointments of aided school teachers under all managements that have set aside sp...
verbatim: Steps will be taken to approve the appointments of aided school teachers under all managements that have set aside specific posts for the appointment of differently-abled people.

title_en: The appointment of eligible special educators who teach differently-abled students serving in government schools will...
verbatim: The appointment of eligible special educators who teach differently-abled students serving in government schools will be regularized in accordance with court rulings, and new posts will be created.

title_en: Remedial measures will be initiated under the leadership of appropriate social work professionals to address mental h...
verbatim: Remedial measures will be initiated under the leadership of appropriate social work professionals to address mental health deterioration, which is one of the main causes of the alarming increase in domestic homicides. Special programs will be implemented for mental well-being.

title_en: Ration will be delivered to the homes of bedridden patients and people with disabilities who are unable to move.
verbatim: Ration will be delivered to the homes of bedridden patients and people with disabilities who are unable to move.

title_en: A 24X7 Senior Citizen Helpline will be launched in all districts. This will provide ambulance, police and social work...
verbatim: A 24X7 Senior Citizen Helpline will be launched in all districts. This will provide ambulance, police and social worker services within 30 minutes.

title_en: Steps will be taken to provide more benefits to palliative nurses working in various local government institutions in...
verbatim: Steps will be taken to provide more benefits to palliative nurses working in various local government institutions in Kerala.

title_en: The health sector will be given first priority. The state budget allocation for health will be increased. Steps will ...
verbatim: The health sector will be given first priority. The state budget allocation for health will be increased. Steps will be taken to allocate a proper budget allocation for medicines and disease tests.

title_en: Patients will not have to sleep on the floor in government hospitals. For this, beds will be made their right for pat...
verbatim: Patients will not have to sleep on the floor in government hospitals. For this, beds will be made their right for patients who come to government hospitals.

title_en: Kerala is the state that bears the highest “out-of-pocket” healthcare expenditure in the country. Steps will be taken...
verbatim: Kerala is the state that bears the highest “out-of-pocket” healthcare expenditure in the country. Steps will be taken to reduce out-of-pocket expenditure in hospitals.

title_en: The highest quality treatment will be ensured in the public sector for diseases such as cancer, heart disease, stroke...
verbatim: The highest quality treatment will be ensured in the public sector for diseases such as cancer, heart disease, stroke, and kidney disease, which drag people into poverty due to excessive "out-of-pocket" costs.

title_en: Steps will be taken to transform Kerala into a world-class health destination.
verbatim: Steps will be taken to transform Kerala into a world-class health destination.

title_en: Plans will be launched to attract patients, including from foreign countries, by integrating branches of medicine inc...
verbatim: Plans will be launched to attract patients, including from foreign countries, by integrating branches of medicine including allopathy and Ayurveda.

title_en: In addition to the budget allocation for the health sector, a new "Health Fund" will be formed by raising funds throu...
verbatim: In addition to the budget allocation for the health sector, a new "Health Fund" will be formed by raising funds through grants, private investments, and CSR.

title_en: Considering the importance of the health sector, the central government will put pressure on the center to increase t...
verbatim: Considering the importance of the health sector, the central government will put pressure on the center to increase the funds allocated and special measures will be taken to ensure that the central funds allocated do not lapse.

title_en: Strict measures will be taken to ensure that no patient suffers due to lack of medicine, inadequate equipment, inadeq...
verbatim: Strict measures will be taken to ensure that no patient suffers due to lack of medicine, inadequate equipment, inadequate treatment, or medical errors.

title_en: The quality of medicines will be strictly ensured. Steps will be taken to ensure that no substandard medicine is sold...
verbatim: The quality of medicines will be strictly ensured. Steps will be taken to ensure that no substandard medicine is sold in Kerala. Steps will be taken to ensure the availability of medicines in government hospitals and to make medicine storage efficient.

title_en: This will prevent the situation where expensive equipment in hospitals is not being used for medical tests due to dam...
verbatim: This will prevent the situation where expensive equipment in hospitals is not being used for medical tests due to damage. A government agency will be established at the state level to properly maintain the equipment.

title_en: Reorganization of health institutions and staff will be carried out through comprehensive resource planning, ensuring...
verbatim: Reorganization of health institutions and staff will be carried out through comprehensive resource planning, ensuring that resources are used more effectively.

title_en: The staffing pattern will be revised. The staff shortage will be addressed by hiring doctors, nurses, lab technicians...
verbatim: The staffing pattern will be revised. The staff shortage will be addressed by hiring doctors, nurses, lab technicians, pharmacists, and allied health personnel in a phased manner.

title_en: To ensure treatment for any emergency disease in the "golden hour", government hospitals with specialty and super spe...
verbatim: To ensure treatment for any emergency disease in the "golden hour", government hospitals with specialty and super specialty operating 24X7 will be ensured in every district. Strong emergency treatment/trauma care will be ensured in secondary level hospitals.

title_en: Existing plans will be revised and resources will be found to ensure that emergency treatment is properly provided in...
verbatim: Existing plans will be revised and resources will be found to ensure that emergency treatment is properly provided in private hospitals as well.

title_en: Ambulance deployment will be made in such a way that an ambulance with emergency treatment facilities will reach ever...
verbatim: Ambulance deployment will be made in such a way that an ambulance with emergency treatment facilities will reach every panchayat.

title_en: The public health cadre will be fully implemented.
verbatim: The public health cadre will be fully implemented.

title_en: Immunization activities at primary health centers will be strengthened.
verbatim: Immunization activities at primary health centers will be strengthened.

title_en: Administrative reforms will be implemented in government hospitals to increase efficiency, modernize the service syst...
verbatim: Administrative reforms will be implemented in government hospitals to increase efficiency, modernize the service system, reduce waiting times, and digitize patient data.

title_en: Complete e-health coordination will be implemented using advanced technology. This will help in facilitating the tran...
verbatim: Complete e-health coordination will be implemented using advanced technology. This will help in facilitating the transfer of patients between different hospitals.

title_en: Digital integration will be implemented by including private hospitals.
verbatim: Digital integration will be implemented by including private hospitals.

title_en: The stalled teleconsultation will be strengthened.
verbatim: The stalled teleconsultation will be strengthened.

title_en: A revised comprehensive health human resources policy will be introduced, eliminating the current technical hurdles, ...
verbatim: A revised comprehensive health human resources policy will be introduced, eliminating the current technical hurdles, to ensure that patients receive expert services in various departments.

title_en: Reforms will be implemented to streamline the functioning of the Hospital Management Committee and the Hospital Devel...
verbatim: Reforms will be implemented to streamline the functioning of the Hospital Management Committee and the Hospital Development Society. Steps will be taken to avoid excessive political interference in the management of government hospitals.

title_en: The Hospital Management Committee and the Hospital Development Society will revise the norms for fund collection and ...
verbatim: The Hospital Management Committee and the Hospital Development Society will revise the norms for fund collection and utilization to ensure that the money collected is used for the benefit of patients in the right manner. Mechanisms will be created to monitor the use of funds.

title_en: The current rules and norms governing the procurement of hospital equipment and essential medicines in emergency situ...
verbatim: The current rules and norms governing the procurement of hospital equipment and essential medicines in emergency situations in government hospitals in Kerala will be revised.

title_en: The current financial restrictions imposed on heads of institutions, including superintendents, principals, and direc...
verbatim: The current financial restrictions imposed on heads of institutions, including superintendents, principals, and directors of medical colleges, will be relaxed to allow them to take emergency decisions in critical situations.

title_en: The multi-storey building constructed at the General Hospital for the new medical college in Thiruvananthapuram will ...
verbatim: The multi-storey building constructed at the General Hospital for the new medical college in Thiruvananthapuram will be opened to patients.

title_en: The situation arising from large international companies buying private hospitals in Kerala will be thoroughly studie...
verbatim: The situation arising from large international companies buying private hospitals in Kerala will be thoroughly studied and necessary steps will be taken.

title_en: Studies will be conducted on the shortcomings of the health care systems for women and children and steps will be tak...
verbatim: Studies will be conducted on the shortcomings of the health care systems for women and children and steps will be taken to address them. Strong systems will be put in place for the health care of women and children at the secondary level. As part of this, “She Hospitals” will be started.

title_en: Commissions will be appointed to comprehensively study issues in various fields such as medical, dental, nursing, pha...
verbatim: Commissions will be appointed to comprehensively study issues in various fields such as medical, dental, nursing, pharmacy, laboratory technology, etc.

title_en: Medical colleges will be given autonomy and transformed into centers of excellence at national level.
verbatim: Medical colleges will be given autonomy and transformed into centers of excellence at national level.

title_en: A commission will be appointed to study the shortcomings in the AYUSH sector and submit suggestions. The problems wil...
verbatim: A commission will be appointed to study the shortcomings in the AYUSH sector and submit suggestions. The problems will be resolved properly and in a timely manner.

title_en: A 'One Health' platform that comprehensively considers the health of humans, animals, and the environment will be imp...
verbatim: A 'One Health' platform that comprehensively considers the health of humans, animals, and the environment will be implemented to prevent infectious diseases such as Nipah and Rabies.

title_en: Mental health services will be made part of primary health centers and better treatment for stroke and heart disease ...
verbatim: Mental health services will be made part of primary health centers and better treatment for stroke and heart disease will be ensured in the public sector.

title_en: Priority will be given to the 'Doorstep Outreach' scheme, which delivers medicines to the homes of the elderly and th...
verbatim: Priority will be given to the 'Doorstep Outreach' scheme, which delivers medicines to the homes of the elderly and the differently-abled. Ammavadi scheme, similar to Anganwadi, will be started for elderly women.

title_en: 'Tribal Health Clusters' will also be started for the health care of the people in tribal areas.
verbatim: 'Tribal Health Clusters' will also be started for the health care of the people in tribal areas.

title_en: Coastal Care Units will be established to ensure health care for people in specific coastal areas.
verbatim: Coastal Care Units will be established to ensure health care for people in specific coastal areas.

title_en: Specific interventions will be made to address the health problems experienced by transgender individuals.
verbatim: Specific interventions will be made to address the health problems experienced by transgender individuals.

title_en: No-bill hospitals will be set up on the model of the Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Resea...
verbatim: No-bill hospitals will be set up on the model of the Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) in Pondicherry.

title_en: The functioning of the Wayanad, Thiruvananthapuram, Konni, Manjeri, Idukki, Palakkad, Kasaragod, and Kollam (Paripall...
verbatim: The functioning of the Wayanad, Thiruvananthapuram, Konni, Manjeri, Idukki, Palakkad, Kasaragod, and Kollam (Paripalli) medical colleges started by the previous UDF government will be improved. Infrastructure, staff, and equipment will be ensured.

title_en: Public health activities will be made more efficient. Special plans and squads will be formed in the event of outbrea...
verbatim: Public health activities will be made more efficient. Special plans and squads will be formed in the event of outbreaks of amoebic encephalitis, jaundice, typhoid, and cholera. Pre-monsoon cleaning will be ensured.

title_en: Cancer prevention activities will be given top priority and special projects will be formulated for this purpose.
verbatim: Cancer prevention activities will be given top priority and special projects will be formulated for this purpose.
